channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Vintage 1991 Zon Legacy Standard Electric Bass Guitar w/ Original Hardshell Case! — $1,599.99
item.description:
$1,599.99 · Good · Izzy's Vintage Guitars

Up for sale is this vintage 1991 Zon Legacy Standard electric bass guitar. A great playing example of a very rare model, this bass took a bit of a beating over the years but still has a ton of life left in it...

It looks to be all original with the exception of two broken off pickup screws (purely cosmetic and, fortunately, stable as it is so we didn't worry about it), the bridge (there is an outline from a previous bridge, pictured), strap locks (nice leather strap with locks included, pictured), and the back plate screws (the machine screws were replaced with regular wood screws). The original black finish shows pretty heavy wear including a ton of dings (perhaps most notably on the horn, pictured) as well as scuffs and scratches. There is a small finish crack on one side of the nut and some finish flaking on the other side of the nut and around the neck screws (pictured).

Our tech has just gone over this one by polishing the frets, spraying out the electronics, cleaning it up, and performing some light set up work. It's a great playing bass with very low, extremely comfortable action all the way up the neck. If you're heavy-handed, you may get some fret buzz here and there but there is plenty of room to adjust for your playing preferences. The original frets do show some wear and light divoting but still retain plenty of life.

The original Zon hardshell case is included and is in good condition although it does show heavy cosmetic wear. All of the latches and hinges are present and work as they should. The instrument will be well-packed inside and out to ensure safe shipping.

These don't show up for sale often and, while it shows a lot of battle scars, this example is a great sounding and playing instrument that could absolutely quickly become a main axe for someone out there. Don't miss out...

Please be sure to check out our other listings for more great items!

THE FINE PRINT: Most of our items are used/vintage. That being said, all sales are FINAL and we do not offer returns. We only ship within the US. We do NOT make exceptions to this rule. We do not accept online trades. Please check our feedback and buy with confidence. If you have any questions, feel free to contact us.

item.title: Ken Smith TN 5 — $6,000
item.description:
$6,000 · Excellent · Tiffany 's Gear Outlet

Up for consideration my 2008 fusion Cut ,


PayPal is method of payment.

No trades


2008 TN

Crotch walnut top And back

5 pc neck

Ebony finger board

Flame maple core ,

Proprietary Ken smith pick ups and pre amp

Original hard case

And strap .

item.title: F Bass BNF - 4 — $5,500
item.description:
$5,500 · Very Good · Horder

I am selling my 2020-2021 Fbass BNF4. It is in 100% mint condition. There is not one blemish on the instrument. It is as new as when it was shipped to me. Here are the specs of the bass. Feel free to ask me anything about the instrument.



Fretted BNF4

- 24 Fret Fingerboard

- Active / Passive with F Bass Preamp, Two Hum-Cancelling F Bass Stacked Single-Coil Pickups - 34" Scale

- 19mm A Style Bridge

- Black Hardware

- FBass Gig Bag Included

- Antique Stain

- 3 piece body with Hard Maple Centre Block, Flamed Soft Maple Wings, with Ebony Veneers

- 3pc Quarter-Sawn Maple Neck

- Antique Stained Neck

- Dalbergia Nigra Brazilian Rosewood Fretted Fingerboard

- No Face Dots

- Matte Sheen

- Ebony Pickup Shell Veneers to Match Knobs

- Ebony Thumb Rest Between Pickups

item.title: Schecter Stiletto Extreme-4 bass in Black Cherry B-Stock 1793 — $479.20
item.description:
$479.20 · B-Stock · LV Guitars

Schecter Stiletto Extreme-4 Bass in Black Cherry — B-Stock #1793

The Stiletto Extreme-4 delivers a balanced, comfortable playing experience with its thin 'C' neck profile and 34" scale, designed for precise fretwork across 24 X-Jumbo frets. The mahogany body with quilted maple top and cream binding presents a refined aesthetic in Black Cherrybolt-on construction and lightweight design keep fatigue minimal during extended sessions. This B-Stock unit arrives brand new with full Schecter warranty coverage.

Playability & Build

The maple neck and rosewood fretboard with pearloid and abalone vector inlays offer reliable playability and visual appeal. At 0.787" thick at the first fret and tapering to 0.866" at the twelfth, the neck sits comfortably in hand, while the 16" fretboard radius and Graph Tech XL Black Tusq nut (1.496" width) ensure clean string articulation across the entire fingerboard.

Tone & Electronics

Two Schecter Diamond Bass humbucking pickups paired with active electronics (volume, blend, and 2-band EQ for bass and treble) deliver versatile tonal control from punchy lows to articulate highs. The 9-volt battery compartment powers the active circuitry, while the Diamond Bass bridge and black chrome hardware ensure stability and durability.

Key Features
  • 4-string configuration with 34" (863mm) scale
  • Mahogany body with quilted maple top and cream 1-ply binding
  • Maple neck in thin 'C' profile; rosewood fretboard with pearloid and abalone vector inlays
  • 24 X-Jumbo frets on 16" radius
  • Graph Tech XL Black Tusq nut, 1.496" width
  • Two Schecter Diamond Bass humbucking pickups
  • Active 2-band EQ (bass and treble boost/cut) with volume and blend controls
  • 9-volt battery compartment (clip-in)
  • Diamond Bass bridge with black chrome hardware
  • Schecter tuners
  • Bolt-on construction
  • Right-handed configuration; ships with Ernie Ball 4-String Super Long (.045–.105)

This B-Stock Stiletto Extreme-4 combines professional-grade electronics, hardware, and materials in a lightweight, ergonomic design—a solid four-string platform for both session work and live performance.

This specific B-Stock unit features minor cosmetic imperfections typical of B-Stock inventory. These marks are purely superficial and have absolutely zero impact on the playability, tone, or structural integrity of the bass. Acquire this premium Schecter Stiletto Extreme-4 at a significant B-Stock discount while enjoying complete manufacturer warranty coverage.

item.title: 1973 Fender Vintage USA Bass Neck Plate — $225
item.description:
$225 · Very Good · JJ's Gear Garage

1973 Fender Vintage USA Bass Neck Plate In very good condition. All original, screws, plastic backplate, and neck plate. Ready for your vintage Fender. Will be packed well, and insured. PLEASE ASK ANY QUESTIONS BEFORE BUYING AND MAKING AN OFFER.

48 States Only, No Overseas

item.title: Gibson Fretless Ripper 1978 Sunburst N Mint "Time Capsule" OHC & Tags — $3,400
item.description:
$3,400 · Excellent · The Classic Axe

This bass is in Near Mint condition. Has a tiny nick near the bottom strap button all else mint. The bass plays & sounds great. It's a 100% original. There is some nice figure that is better in person than in photos. Low action & A real nice Ebony board strung with flats, The case is in Great condition also. Comes with a set of tags . As it appeared out of the factory in 1978. it is a 45 year old "Time Capsule". The bass weighs just below 12 pounds.

item.title: 66 Fender Precision Bass all original SB — $5,000
item.description:
$5,000 · Very Good · Kirk's Gear Page

I just retired from many years of pro playing. It's time to start selling off some of my keepers. These basses need to be played. Here is my first offering....


This is an all original 66 P that is for all intents and purposes a pre CBS L series P bass (Mar 66). Made just after the sale of Fender to CBS. No routes or mods of any kind. Plays great and light weight at just under 8 lbs. Thomastik Infeld jazz flats that I put on it when I bought it 10 years ago. Lovely slim C neck that is broken in and smooth. Comes with the original tug bar but the screws are missing. The bridge cover is original but the pickup cover appears to be a newer relic although it could be original. 4 original screws for the chrome covers, the original tugbar and the original nut are included (it needed a new nut when I got it). The original case is pretty beat but works. One of the latches has a broken spring but the catch works as it should. Gorilla tape on the ends to keep it from disintegrating. It plays and sounds just like it should. Add to your collection or take it to the gig. It's ready to play. No trades please. Shipping will be $150 to the lower 48 states only.

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe Bass VI 2019 - Present - Black — $498.92
item.description:
$498.92 · Good · Bison Friendly Guitars

This is an intriguing instrument and really fun to play - a six string bass with style and a wammy bar? Oh yes! The neck is good and it's really playable. It's in great condition as are the strings - except for one knock on the bottom - the paint is chipped off exposing the wood (also painted black so it's hard to see) in a section about 4cm by 2cm.

I've attached a photo of this. I've never gigged it and only played it in a smoke-free home. It's got no case and although I will package it extremely well and it will be insured.

item.title: Player Jazz Bass®, Maple Fingerboard, Tidepool - Sea Foam Green — $500
item.description:
$500 · Very Good · Josh's Place

Here is the link from Fender's website that describes it's original specs:

This base has been used at church since I purchased it new. There are some ripples on the body's backing that does not impact its playability. Also, the 9th fret discolored a bit. I am unsure as to why this happened as I keep the base in its gig bag while not in use. With that said, it still plays wonderfully. I am parting with this bass because I recently purchased a new Jackson Pro Series Spectra Bass SBP IV. I want to use the funds from this sale to purchase a P-Bass to add to my lineup.

The gig bag comes with the bass.

item.title: 2004 Squier Affinity Precision Bass - Galactic Blue - 4 String — $225
item.description:
$225 · Very Good · Guitars West

2004 Squier Affinity Precision Bass

- Galactic Blue

- 4 String

- 8.1 LBS

You are looking at a 2004 P-Bass in the classic Galactic Blue finish. This isn't a modern mass-produced unit; this was crafted at the highly-regarded Cort (IC) factory in Indonesia during an era known for consistent build quality and excellent neck stability.

Verified Year: 2004 (Serial Prefix IC04)

The Look: Solid Galactic Blue finish with a crisp white pickguard.

The Sound: That unmistakable 20-year-old seasoned wood tone. It delivers the punch and low-end clarity you expect from a genuine Precision Bass.

Shipping: Fast, secure shipping from Murrieta, CA.

Guitars West Shipping & Return

In our 40 + years of business, customer service has always been the utmost Importance to us.

If you have ANY questions, comments, or concerns, please contact us BEFORE purchasing this item!! We are happy to offer a short clip of the tone/sound of your preferred item as well. Just give us a call/email and we’ll get it to you asap.

We do have a Strict NO Return Policy. If you receive your item and it’s not as described, we will take that into consideration.

We are very confident that our thorough, honest, detailed descriptions are backed by our knowledge of this industry. I can assure you that you?ll be getting exactly what you anticipated.

If purchased on SALE/DISCOUNT, the item is considered SOLD AS IS and will NOT be considered for a return.

International Shipping: We charge an estimated flat rate fee. Our rates listed are just ESTIMATES. If it exceeds the flat rate price, the shipping amount is subject to change. Please call us for exact estimates.

Thanks - GW Crew

item.title: 2025 Schecter C-4 Standard Electric Bass! Tobacco Burl Finish! VERY NICE!!! — $399
item.description:
$399 · Mint · Top 40 Guitars

At Top 40 Guitars, customer satisfaction is our first concern. All of our items have a 14 day return policy. If after 14 days you are not completely satisfied with your purchase, please return it for a refund....Peace be with you...


*all returned items must be in the same condition they were at the time of sale. All original packing must be included.


#
Up for Sale is a


2025 Schecter C-4 Standard Electric Bass!

Tobacco Burl Finish!

This is really Cool. You are looking at a 2025 Schecter C-4 Standard Electric Bass. Iconic Tobacco Burl Finish. The C-4 Standard Tobacco Burl bass guitar is a true workhorse designed for players who demand both power and style. With a mahogany body and a stunning figured burl top, this bass is as visually striking as it is sonically versatile. Known for crafting instruments that can handle everything from metal to jazz, Schecter has equipped the C-4 Standard with features that deliver uncompromising tone and playability. Whether you're performing live or recording in the studio, this bass provides the depth and clarity you need to make every note count.

This Bass has never been sold before. It was used at Schecter's Corporate office for Internet Sales Videos, Print Media and Brochure photos. Not a "B" Stock, Factory Return or Open Box. It is in "Like New" Condition. It is being sold as a used Bass.

From The Web:


Crafted for Comfort and Performance
This bass is built with a roasted maple neck and a rosewood fingerboard, giving you a smooth, responsive feel under your fingers. The thin “C” neck shape provides comfortable playability, allowing for fast and effortless movement up and down the fretboard. With a 34” scale length and 16” fingerboard radius, this bass strikes the perfect balance between playability and tone, making it versatile enough for any style of music. Whether you’re laying down a groove or playing intricate lines, the C-4 Standard delivers.

Powerful Tone With Schecter’s Signature Pickups
Equipped with Schecter Diamond Standard soapbar pickups in both the bridge and neck positions, the C-4 Standard gives you a full range of tones to explore. The soapbar pickups are designed to provide clarity, punch, and warmth, making them suitable for everything from aggressive rock to mellow jazz. Each pickup has independent volume and tone controls, allowing you to fine-tune your sound and create the perfect mix for any playing situation. These pickups are a signature feature of Schecter’s bass lineup, offering both versatility and power.

Durable Hardware for Reliable Performance
The C-4 Standard doesn’t just sound great—it’s built to last. With black hardware and a Schecter Diamond bass bridge, this bass offers solid tuning stability and sustain. The Schecter bass tuners provide smooth and accurate tuning adjustments, while the 38mm graphite nut ensures that your strings stay in tune even during intense playing. This attention to detail and reliability is what makes Schecter guitars and basses a top choice for professional musicians who need an instrument they can depend on.

Built to Inspire on Stage and in the Studio
Whether you’re hitting the stage or recording in the studio, the Schecter C-4 Standard Tobacco Burl Bass Guitar is designed to inspire. Its bold design, rich tone, and exceptional playability make it a versatile instrument for any musician. Complete with a 24-fret rosewood fingerboard and jumbo frets, the C-4 Standard offers both comfort and precision for players at any level. And with its eye-catching tobacco burl finish, this bass is sure to turn heads wherever you play.

Features:

  • Mahogany body with a striking figured burl top
  • Schecter Diamond Standard soapbar pickups for versatile tones
  • Independent volume and tone controls for each pickup
  • Roasted maple neck with a smooth rosewood fingerboard
  • Schecter Diamond bass bridge for stability and sustain

Specs:
Body:

  • Body wood: Mahogany with figured burl top
  • Binding: Black single-ply on body and neck

Neck:

  • Neck material: Roasted maple
  • Neck shape: Thin C
  • Scale length: 34"
  • Fingerboard radius: 16"
  • Nut width: 38mm
  • Nut material: Graphite

Fingerboard:

  • Fingerboard material: Rosewood
  • Inlays: White pearloid dot
  • Number of frets: 24 jumbo

Electronics:

  • Pickup configuration: Soapbar
  • Bridge pickup: Schecter Diamond Standard soapbar
  • Neck pickup: Schecter Diamond Standard soapbar
  • Controls: Independent volume and tone controls for bridge and neck pickups

Hardware:

  • Hardware color: Black
  • Tuners: Schecter bass tuners
  • Bridge: Schecter Diamond bass bridge

Our luthier did a complete setup. Brand new strings were installed. Gig ready on Arrival!


Nut Width: 1.496"

Weight: 7.55 lbs.


Case is NOT Included!

Due to CITES Treaty for Endangered Wood (Mahogany, Rosewood) We no longer ship out of the USA.


Cosmetics: Mint Condition. 

  • Top 40 Guitars is a Veteran Owned Business!
  • Thanks For Supporting Veterans!

item.title: Washburn AB-10 acoustic/electric bass w/bag - blk — $435
item.description:
$435 · Very Good · Guit-fiddle Shop

Works great. Straight neck, low action, truss turns, frets are excellent, electronics are clean. New D'Addario 45s. Has some scratches and light wear throughout. Truss cover is aftermarket. It isn't a perfect fit and is only using one screw since the other two holes don't line up. Bag is in great shape.

Ships to lower 48. No international. No P.O. boxes. No trades. Return policy: happy to take a return if the item doesn't match the description&photos. If there's shipping damage we'll get it sorted quickly. But I can't take any more "bought this by mistake" returns. One-man operation here. The last straw was a guy who complained an item was "in too good condition". Anyway, please triple check your order before purchasing. Thanks for understanding.

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man Stingray 3 EQ H 2008 - Black/Maple w/ Hard Case — $1,650
item.description:
$1,650 · Very Good · Prism Analog

Nice '08 Stingray bass. 3 EQ H in black/maple. Some wear to fingerboard varnish, but just adds character. Very solid instrument, looks and plays the part. Not pictured, but included: Original Music Man hard case, also super solid.

Pick up in Philly is OK.

item.title: 1973 Fender USA Jazz Bass Original Vintage Tuners — $275
item.description:
$275 · Very Good · JJ's Gear Garage

1973 Fender USA Jazz Bass Original Vintage Tuners in very good condition. Original, ferrules, and tuners. 8 screws are longer, appear original, 8 are shorter and more shiny, possibly replacements. Tuners work perfectly, light tarnishing, and wear. Ready for your vintage bass. Will be packed well and fully insured. PLEASE ASK ANY QUESTIONS BEFORE BUYING OR MAKING AN OFFER.

48 States Only, No Overseas

item.title: Michael Kelly Club Custom 4N Acoustic Bass Guitar — $350
item.description:
$350 · Excellent · Jonny's Bass Basket

Selling my old Schecter acoustic-electric bass (06060093) that I hardly ever use now. There are no dents or scratches on this instrument, so it's basically as good as new. All electronics are original and unmodified, and a fitted hard case/guitar strap will be included.


Available for local pickup in Arlington, VA or willing to meet up in the surrounding areas. Price is negotiable.

item.title: Schecter Stiletto Studio-4 FL Active Fretless 4-String Bass 2010s - Honey Satin — $600
item.description:
$600 · Very Good · Jonny's Bass Basket

Selling my old 2010s Schecter fretless bass (W11121245) that I hardly ever use now. There is a small dent on the back side (see last pic), but otherwise, it's basically as good as new. All electronics are original and unmodified, and a standard Road Runner hard case will be included.


Available for local pickup in Arlington, VA or willing to meet up in the surrounding areas. Price is negotiable.

item.title: YAMAHA RBX550 M ELECTRIC BASS GUITAR W.EMG'S TRANS. BLUE 1980's (USED) — $399.99
item.description:
$399.99 · Very Good · Harper's Music Store

YAMAHA RBX550 M ELECTRIC BASS GUITAR W.EMG'S TRANS. BLUE 1980's (USED)

This is a Used Item in Very Good Condition. The pickups have been upgraded to EMG's. The input jack has been moved from the side to the face of the bass.
The Original Volume and Tone controls for the bass have been modified from the original 3 holes, and a dummy toggle switch was installed.  
There are two small screw holes on the face of the bass by the bottom. There are some scratches/dings from normal wear.
Please view pictures and approve condition before purchasing.
Does not come with a case.

***PICKUP ONLY***

Here is some info from the web for the Original (Un-Modded) Bass. (Please check for accuracy):

 The Yamaha RBX 550M is a passive electric bass guitar introduced in the late 1980s. The "M" designation specifies that it features an optional maple fingerboard with black dot markers, differentiating it from the standard rosewood model. Key Features
  • Tonewoods: Built with an alder or basswood body, a bolt-on maple neck, and a matching maple fretboard.
  • Electronics: Configured with passive Precision/Jazz (P/J) pickups controlled by a master volume, tone, and pickup selector knob.
  • Design: Noted for its highly lightweight, balanced body, distinctive pointed or 3D headstock, and 22 frets.

item.title: Ibanez GSRM20 Gio miKro Soundgear 2023 - Pearl White — $200
item.description:
$200 · Excellent · Guitarminator's Shop

New with tags. Purchased as a backup, no longer needed. Never gigged only played for an hour at most. Ships well packed and quick. FREE SHIPPING

item.title: Fender Jazz Bass Special Fretless - Candy Apple Red — $989
item.description:
$989 · Very Good · Brian's Stuff

1986 Fender Jazz Bass Special — Made in Japan — Fretless — Candy Apple Red —
Here's a rare one — a mid-1980s Fender Jazz Bass Special, Made in Japan, in stunning Candy Apple Red with all-black hardware. Serial number D920289 dates this to approximately 1986, right in the sweet spot of Fender Japan's golden era of production.
These basses are legendary in the bass world — the same model made famous by Duff McKagan of Guns N' Roses during their classic era. The Jazz Bass Special combines a Precision Bass body with a Jazz Bass neck profile and a versatile P/J pickup configuration — giving you the best of both worlds in one instrument.
What makes this one special: it's a fretless — rare on this model, which came fretted as standard. If you're looking for a smooth, singing fretless tone with the punch of a P/J pickup setup, this is a seriously hard combination to find.
Specs:

1986 Fender Jazz Bass Special — Made in Japan
Serial: D920289
Candy Apple Red finish
P/J pickup configuration
Fretless rosewood fingerboard
Black hardware throughout
Active electronics cavity routed in back (no pickguard)
Condition: Very good — clean finish, minimal wear

These MIJ Fenders from the mid-80s are widely regarded as some of the best production Fenders ever made — built at the Fuji-gen factory with materials and fit/finish that rivaled and often exceeded what was coming out of the US factory at the time.

item.title: Fender American Original '50s Precision Bass with Maple Fretboard 2018 - White Blonde — $1,995
item.description:
$1,995 · Excellent · Mike's Shop

Excellent condition. Includes original tweed case, bridge cover, pickup cover, COA, and all original case candy.

Upgraded with Fender Pure Vintage 63 Precision pickups. Original pickups are not included.

Body: Alder
Gloss Nitrocellulose Lacquer Finish
White Blonde
Thick C Maple Neck
Maple Fingerboard
9.5" Fingerboard Radius
Vintage Tall Frets
34" Scale Length
1.73" Bone Nut
Pure Vintage 63 Split-Coil Precision Pickup
Pure Vintage Reverse Open-Gear Tuners
Vintage-Style 4-Saddle Threaded Steel Bridge
Includes Vintage Tweed Hardshell Case

item.title: Yamaha SB-2 Japan 1960s — $1,200
item.description:
$1,200 · Good · Polyisus Vintage Gear Shop

For sale my vintage short scale Yamaha SB-2 bass from 60s

It is lightweight and resonant, sunburst finish and all original components.

a recent refret makes it extremely comfortable and stable to play.

item.title: Wal Mk 1 4-String Bass 1987 — $9,170
item.description:
$9,170 · Excellent · JAMES's Gear Emporium CF

Beautiful and rare!

1987 Wal Mk I 4-string bass, serial number W2924, in very good condition.

  • Mahogany body
  • Walnut top
  • Ebony fingerboard

Includes the original hard case.

If you're looking at this listing, you already know what this instrument is—there's no need to explain the outstanding tonal possibilities of this exceptional bass.

item.title: Spector NS Dimension 5 2022 - Present - Black & Blue — $1,200
item.description:
$1,200 · Very Good · Vatos Closet

This is a 2022 Spector NS Dimension 5 bass that is now discontinued. Neck is straight, truss rod turns as it should, all electronics and Fluence voices work correctly, and the bass plays cleanly across the fingerboard without any functional issues. Very good overall for its age, but it is not mint. There is a small finish chip/ding along the upper edge of the headstock and on the side of the neck shown clearly in the close-up photos. Please review all photos closely, as they are part of the condition description.

item.title: Fender Flea Artist Series Road Worn Signature Jazz Bass 2016 - Present - Shell Pink — $1,050
item.description:
$1,050 · Excellent · Pops Boutique

Rarely played 2016 Flea Roadworn Jazz Bass. Selling to thin collection and because I prefer P-Basses. Lovely addition to any bassist’s arsenal. Looking for a good home and to be played. Thank you for considering.

item.title: Aria Dimond 1980 - Floss black — $350
item.description:
$350 · Very Good · Randybasap

Vintage 1980s Aria diamond in almost excellent condition this base still plays like a dream it's professionally set up comes with the original hard shell case classic japanese craftsmanship.

item.title: Jackson Blackstone Gladys signature pro 5 string 2025 - Gloss black with gold — $875
item.description:
$875 · Excellent · Randybasap

I literally just bought this new last month and now need the money back, it's a beautiful Bass look it up it's about as perfect as it gets, Jackson Blackstone pro 5 string, I paid 1250 for the bass and case, after tax and that I'm in to it for about 1500,

item.title: Ibanez GSR200-TR Transparent Red — $225
item.description:
$225 · Excellent · Tyler’s Shop

Ibanez gio200 transparent red. looks great and plays great. Bought it new and have barely played it.


The Ibanez GSR200 4-string electric bass guitar is a hot little bass for a very friendly price. The GSR200 features a poplar body, super comfy one piece maple neck, jatoba fretboard, white dot inlay, split-coil and single-coil pickup array, active EQ with PHAT II Bass Boost, chrome hardware, a fully adjustable bridge and medium frets

item.title: Fender American Vintage '74 Jazz Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 2013 - 2014 - Natural — $2,000
item.description:
$2,000 · Excellent · Skyline Guitar

Fender American Vintage '74 Jazz Bass. Excellent condition.

Plays superbly. Electronics are working properly. Frets are in excellent condition, with no fret wear. Very low playing time. One small finish imperfection, as seen in the photos. It is an indent on the finish, but does not go all the way to the wood. Small and not visible at a distance. Otherwise, no other scratches or dents.

Fender has been doing various replica years in the American Vintage series for a while now. This one is modeled on the '74 specs, an era that featured block inlays fretboard markers, binding on the neck, the option for 'natural' finish, and the 70's era headstock decals.

Great for a pure player, or for a player/collector.

Please take a close look at the photos for the condition.

I am a player and a collector, not a shop. Therefore, I sell items as-is and cannot offer returns (outside of shipping damage claims, which have never happened on my sales so far, luckily).

I take pride in trying to give an accurate description of the pieces I sell. I want the buyer to be happy with the condition of any piece I sell, so please let me know if you have any questions that you need addressed.

I have included a screenshot of the specs provided by Fender.


This is the text of Fender's description when they were available: "For the bassist who craves pure vintage Fender style, the American Vintage series presents original-era model year basses built with meticulous attention to accurate detail that bring Fender history and heritage to authentic and exciting new life.

If you prize the Jazz Bass and love the 1970s, this bass was made for you. A pure, powerful and proven instrument with singing high end and guttural growl, the mid-'70s Jazz Bass is an elemental must-have classic stylishly built with the heart of rock and the soul of funk. Built using original tooling and based on actual 1974 models we tracked down, the U.S.-made American Vintage '74 Jazz Bass honors a great instrument from a fantastic era."

item.title: Fender Player II Precision Bass Cactus Gray - — $849.99
item.description:
$849.99 · Brand New · Mantova's Two Street Music

Step into the spotlight and experience iconic Fender® sound and style with the Player II Precision Bass® — a stage-ready bass guitar with contemporary updates to power your performance and inspire your playing.

The Player II Precision Bass radiates timeless Fender charm, but under the hood, it's primed for today's players. Everything about the neck is designed for fast and fluid playability, from the Modern “C”-profile with silky satin urethane finish on the back to the comfy 9.5”-radius slab rosewood or maple fingerboard with smooth rolled edges and 20 medium jumbo frets. A classic alder body is available in both timeless Fender finishes and never-before-seen colors unearthed from the archives. Player Series Alnico V Split-Coil P bass® pickups offer sweet highs, musical mids and seismic lows that elevate any genre. An adjustable 4-saddle bridge, single-groove steel saddles and open-gear tuners ensure precise tuning stability for the flexibility to explore endless sonic possibilities.

Perfect for crafting your own sound, the Player II Precision Bass has the looks, tone and feel that only a Fender delivers.

Features
  • Contoured Alder Body
  • Modern "C" Neck Profile
  • 9.5“-Radius Maple or Rosewood Fingerboard with Rolled Edges
  • Player Series Alnico V Split-Coil Precision Bass® Pickups
  • 4-Saddle Bridge with Single-Groove Steel “Barrel” Saddles
  • Open-Gear Tuning Machines

item.title: 1979 Rickenbacker 4001 Bass White with RARE original CHECKERBOARD BINDING!!! — $4,395
item.description:
$4,395 · Fair · Olivia's Vintage

Olivia's Vintage would like to present this 1979 Rickenbacker 4001 in its original White finish with factory checkerboard binding. It's very rare to see anything other than a Doubleneck from this period of time with this checkerboard purfling/binding. The clear coat finish has turned very yellow and a previous owner removed most of the clear coat from the top of the body, bringing out the exposed white color of the paint from underneath the clear coat. It has a good playing neck with good frets. It's all original with the exception of a later Rickenbacker neck position pickup, a few of the wires and a few of the pickguard screws. The original hardshell case is included and the handle has had some work to secure it with some replaced screws. There are lots of nicks + dings, finish checking, some finish worn off from play wear, some finish worn off by sanding and other cosmetic wear. The pickguard has a couple of cracks around the neck position pickup. There is also the slightest bit of seam separation on the bottom edge of the body that has caused a small finish crack. The bass itself remains structurally sound. All electronics work and sound great.
We are happy to ship internationally.

item.title: 1978 Fender Precision Bass Modded P/J Bartolinis w/OHSC — $2,795
item.description:
$2,795 · Good · Imperial Vintage Guitars

1978 Fender Precision Bass Modded P/J Bartolinis w/OHSC

This Bass Is In Good Overall Condition With Heavy Playwear Visible Throughout (See Photos)

Located At IVG Orange

Original Body And Neck Date To 1978, Both Showing Lots Of Playwear, Checking Visible On Body

Bartolini P/J Pickup Set, Routed J Pickup Is Done Well

Master Volume/Tone Knobs With Added 3-Way Selector Switch For Pickup Selection

Rosewood Fingerboard With Dot Inlays

Original Fender Hardware

Original Frets Are In Very Good Condition

Replaced Pickguard

Weighs 11lbs 1oz

Nut Width 1.61"

Neck Depth At 1st Fret 0.88", At 12th Fret 1.01"

Comes With Original Fender Molded Hardshell Case

A true vintage Fender with professional player upgrades, this 1978 Fender Precision Bass combines the unmistakable feel and character of a late-'70s USA P Bass with the added versatility of a P/J Bartolini pickup configuration. Finished in its classic vintage style and complete with the Original Hardshell Case, this bass delivers the best of both worlds—collectible Fender craftsmanship and modern tonal flexibility.

The original ash body and maple neck provide the unmistakable punch, sustain, and resonance that have made late-'70s Precision Basses favorites among touring musicians for decades. Upgraded with Bartolini Precision and Jazz pickups, this bass offers everything from the classic authoritative P Bass thump to articulate bridge pickup growl and countless blended tones in between. Whether you're playing rock, funk, blues, country, jazz, or modern sessions, it delivers exceptional clarity, output, and dynamic response.

Comfortable, road-tested, and built during one of Fender's most recognizable eras, this 1978 Precision Bass is an outstanding choice for players seeking authentic vintage mojo without sacrificing versatility. The professional P/J modification makes it a perfect stage and studio instrument while retaining the unmistakable feel of a genuine vintage Fender.

item.title: Hamer Cruise bass — $549.99
item.description:
$549.99 · Very Good · Super Pawn

Vintage Hamer bass with Schaller machines and a Gotoh bridge plays and sounds great with the ususal nicks and dings (normal 40 year wear) aftermarket gig bag included.

item.title: Aria Pro II CSB Deluxe MIJ 1984 — $526.87
item.description:
$526.87 · Very Good · Paul's Vintage Japanese Gear Outlet

Great condition Aria Pro II  CSB Deluxe "Cardinal Bass" 1984.

These models were produced from 1984 to 1985 so a little rare.
Has a few very light scratches/dings on the body (please check out the pix carefully) but overall in great shape for its age. It has a good range of tones from the 2 pickups and plays well up and down the neck.

The neck is very clean and in great condition with no major dings or scratches.

I replaced the foam under the pickups that allows them to be raised and lowered as the original foam tends to harden over the years and doesn't allow for any pickup height adjustment. I also made a full neck pocket shim.


* I've done a basic setup with new strings but would recommend you do your own to suit your playing style.


Truss rod: functions and can still tighten.
Frets: about 90% plus left
Electronics: All functioning.
Neck: Straight, Setup now with a some relief.
Action: Low E at the 17th fret - 2.75mm G at the 17th fret -2.50 mm (still room to go up or down)
Weight: 3.74kg  8.24 lb
Hardware: Everything turning smoothly (saddle height screws, Intonation screws, Tuners)


Specs...

Body - Ash/Alder
Neck - Maple / rosewood board
Scale Length - 820mm
Nut - Bone
Pickups - 2 x MB-IV Double Coil
Controls - Master Volume,  Master Tone, 3 way toggle selector switch.

Comes with non original gig bag

Boxed, shipped and tracked via EMS Japan Post.

Tarif included in the shipping cost for US customers.

For shipping to Spain, Korea or Australia I'll have to remove the neck due to box length limitations.

item.title: Greco Phoenix PXB 400 — $831.60
item.description:
$831.60 · Very Good · Jan Bass Collection

Greco Made in Japan in the early 00's, this is part of the Greco PXB series. 24 frets on a smooth maple neck/rosewood fingerboard with Gotoh tuners and Greco branded Jazz/P-Bass pickup combo.

Compact body and a total weight of only 3.4kg's make it a super manageable and mobile option.
Great condition. Only minor wear and tear as pictured. Only very slight patina on the hardware, no signs of major rust.
Frets have plenty of life left in them and play very smooth. Neck is straight.
Electronics-features the original Greco labelled pickups.

item.title: Fender Classic Player Rascal Bass 2015 - Ocean Turquoise — $1,787.28
item.description:
$1,787.28 · Excellent · Jan Bass Collection

Originally created in the Fender Custom Shop by Master Builder Jason Smith, the Rascal Bass joins the Fender bass lineup as a sleek short-scale Classic Player model loaded with distinctive features and personality that will appeal to the bassist with a flair for the unconventional. With its '60s-era Bass VI body, three Seymour Duncan® Lipstick Tube Stratocaster® pickups, short scale length (30"), unusual fingerboard inlay design, gorgeous gloss Ocean Turquoise finish with matching Coronado headstock and more, there’s no other Fender bass quite like the Rascal.

  • 30" scale length
  • Bass VI body with Ocean Turquoise finish and matching Coronado headstock
  • 9.5"-radius rosewood fingerboard with 21 medium jumbo frets and special inlays (bass-side dot markers from 3rd to 9th frets, double dots at 12th fret, treble-side dot markers from 15th to 21st frets)
  • Three Seymour Duncan® Lipstick Tube Stratocaster® pickups
  • Five-way pickup switch
  • Push-pull master volume control that delivers seven pickup configurations

item.title: Cimar Grabber by Ibanez — $1,667.97
item.description:
$1,667.97 · Very Good · Jan Bass Collection

Body:Alder

Neck:Maple

Fingerboard:Maple

Construction:Bolt On

Frets:20

Pickup:Maxon Humbucker

Electronics:Passive

Controls:Volume, Tone

Weight:4.2kg

Neck width at nut (mm):42

String spacing at the bridge (mm):18

item.title: Squier Standard Jazz Bass 2008 — $297.55
item.description:
$297.55 · Very Good · Instant Comptant Langelier

  • Body Material: Poplar (gloss finish).
  • Neck Material: Maple (satin finish).
  • Neck Shape: "C" Shape (Slim).
  • Scale Length: 34" (864 mm).
  • Fingerboard Material: Maple or Indian Laurel.
  • Fingerboard Radius: 9.5" (241 mm).
  • Number of Frets: 20.
  • Fret Size: Medium Jumbo.
  • Nut Material: Synthetic Bone.
  • Nut Width: 1.5" (38.1 mm).
  • Bridge Pickup: Ceramic Single-Coil Jazz Bass.
  • Neck Pickup: Ceramic Single-Coil Jazz Bass.
  • Controls: Volume 1 (Neck), Volume 2 (Bridge), Master Tone.
  • Bridge: 4-Saddle Standard.
  • Tuning Machines: Vintage-Style Open-Gear.
  • Hardware Finish: Chrome.
  • Strings: Nickel Plated Steel (.045-.105 Gauges).

item.title: Peavey TL5 USA 1991 - Red Translucent — $1,906.59
item.description:
$1,906.59 · Very Good · Jan Bass Collection

A beautiful 1st Generation Red-Translucent Peavey TL-5 bass guitar. Unity neck thru body construction. Ebony fingerboard with 12" radius, 2-Super Ferrite (Hum cancelling) pickups.  On board active 3 band EQ (9-volt powered) Low impedance output.  Schalier 5-string bridge.  Gold finish hardware except knobs.  1.9" neck with Genuine Mother of Pearl Oval inlays.  Separate Battery compartment.

item.title: GStyle Belcat 5 String Bass — $223.16
item.description:
$223.16 · Very Good · Instant Comptant Langelier

GStyle 5-string electric basses, often featuring Belcat electronics, are budget-friendly, active/passive instruments usually constructed with a poplar or zebrawood-topped mahogany body and a maple neck. They generally feature a 34" or 35.5" scale length, soapbar pickups, a 2-band or 3-band EQ, and a nut width around 1.75" to 2"

  • Pickups: Passive Soapbar pickups (often Belcat BJ-80-5 with ferrite magnets).
  • Electronics: Active/Passive preamp system, usually controlled by 2 volume and 3 tone controls (or volume, blend, bass, treble).
  • Body: Commonly listed as Poplar, sometimes with a Zebrawood top, or Millettia Laurentii+Okoume.
  • Neck: Bolt-on Maple.
  • Fingerboard: Usually composite ebony or rosewood, typically with 24 frets or fretless options.
  • Scale Length: 34 inches to 35.5 inches.
  • Nut Width: 1.75 inches (\(44.45\text{ mm}\)) to 2 inches (\(50.8\text{ mm}\)).
  • Hardware: Die-cast black tuners.

item.title: Fender Pawn Shop Series Reverse Jaguar Bass 2013 - Candy Apple Red — $1,667.97
item.description:
$1,667.97 · Very Good · Jan Bass Collection

This Fender Pawn Shop™ Reverse Jaguar® Bass is loaded with two enormous Reverse Jaguar humbucking pickups and a streamlined control layout of a single three-way pickup toggle switch and two knobs (volume and tone). It's one of the most individual Fender bass guitars ever made.

Pawn Shop Series guitars are inspired by the more eccentric Fender creations of the mid-'60s to mid-'70s, which randomly found their way in to the outside world and the more apocryphal pages of Fender history.

These unique instruments have been crafted for modern sound and quality. This striking Jaguar Bass presents a creative alchemy of diverse Fender elements. The Pawn Shop Series' mandate was to introduce an unconventional assortment of "guitars that never were but should have been," including the family's first bass guitar model.


Features/Specifications:

Body & Bridge:

  • Body: Alder
  • Body Shape: Jaguar®
  • Body Finish: Red (Polyester)
  • Bridge: New Fender® High Mass Modern Bridge
  • Pickguards: 3-Ply White/Black/White

Neck:

  • Neck Shape: "C" Shape
  • Number of Frets: 20
  • Fret Size: Medium Jumbo
  • Fretboard Radius: 9.5" (24.1 cm)
  • Fretboard: Maple
  • Neck Material: Maple
  • Neck Finish: Urethane
  • Nut Width: 1.625" (41.3 mm)
  • Scale Length: 32" (81.2 cm)
  • String Nut: Synthetic Bone

Pickups & Hardware:

  • Pickup Configuration: H/H
  • Pickups:
  • Bridge Pickup: Reverse Jaguar® Bass Humbucking Pickup
  • Middle Pickup: Reverse Jaguar® Bass Humbucking Pickup
  • Pickup Switching:
    • 3-Position Toggle:
      • Position 1. Bridge Pickup
      • Position 2. Bridge and Middle Pickups
      • Position 3. Middle Pickup
  • Controls: Master Volume, Master Tone
  • Tuning Machines: Vintage '70s bass
  • Strings: Fender® USA, NPS, (Gauges .045-.105)

item.title: OX BIRD Pino Palladino Thunder Bass 2000s -RED — $1,071.41
item.description:
$1,071.41 · Very Good · Jan Bass Collection

Customized by OX BIRD- Pino Palladino update
Body BaCH
Humbuckers Montreaux 70s Thunderbird Set.
Neck BaCH
Bridge Guyker
Tunning Guyker

item.title: Fender American Vintage ‘62 Reissue Jazz Bass 2005 - Sunburst — $2,000
item.description:
$2,000 · Very Good · Shore Point Vintage Guitars

2005 Fender American Vintage '62 Reissue Jazz Bass. This bass is all original and in very good condition. Just pro setup, it plays and sounds great. Comes with the original case and paperwork.

This item is also available for local pickup at our store, please call for an appointment.

Please check out our website; message or call with any questions, photo or measurement requests.

48 HR return policy upon your receipt. I will issue a full refund minus any of my shipping costs when the item arrives back to me how it left.

item.title: Joseph scroll 2025 - oil — $3,579.33
item.description:
$3,579.33 · Excellent · Joseph bass

Scroll model 34" fretless

Bass is made of walnut body

Mahagony neck

Purplehearth fretboard

Gotoh tuners

Emg mm tw pickups

Push pull for split coil option

Bass is one of kinde sounds killer and plays like butter.

Very elegant and ergonimc. Neck is slim and easy to play.

21mm thick on 1 fret 23mm on 12 fret. Radius is 18" - 20"

String spacing from 17-19mm ( now is 18mm)

weight 4.2kg

shiped with bag.

item.title: Fender Vintera II '70s Telecaster Bass, Maple Fingerboard, Vintage White, Gig Bag — $850
item.description:
$850 · Mint · Mike's Music and Sound Inc

Serial# MX25026235

Includes Fender Deluxe Hard Shell Case

This Fender Vintera II 70s Telecaster Bass is a recent consignment at Mike's Music and Sound. The bass is in mint condition and has been completely setup by our guitar techs. The neck is straight, the frets have very little wear and the truss rod functions properly. Electronics have been cleaned and are noise free. Pictures are the actual item for sale and not stock images. Mike's Music and Sound is a small family owned, single store and most of our inventory is on display for our customers to see and play. Our staff will fully inspect and test your item before we ship and if we do by chance find an issue with your order, you will be notified immediately and given options if need be.

If you have any questions, please feel free to message us.

EXTRA $65 SHIPPING FOR THIS ITEM

Revive the timeless sound of the '70s with the Vintera® II '70s Telecaster® Bass and experience the iconic looks, inspiring feel and incomparable tone that only a Fender can deliver.

The Vintera® II '70s Telecaster® Bass features an alder body and a maple neck for classic Fender tone that's full of punch and clarity. The mid-'70s "C"-shape neck is based on a classic '70s profile for an intuitive and inviting feel, while the 7.25" radius fingerboard with vintage-tall frets provide vintage comfort with ample room for big bends and expressive vibrato. Under the hood, the vintage-style wide-range bass humbucker delivers the iconic Fender sound: warm, woody, dynamic and powerful. The vintage-style 2-saddle bridge and vintage-style "fender"-stamped tuning machines provide classic looks with enhanced intonation and tuning stability to complete the package.

Experience the unmistakable vintage feel and unmatched sound of a classic Fender with the Vintera® II '70s Telecaster® Bass today and start making music history!

SPECS

•Series: Vintera® II
•Orientation: Right-Hand
•Color: Vintage White
•Headstock: Telecaster®
•Neck Material: Maple
•Neck Finish: Gloss Urethane
•Neck Shape: Mid '70s "C"
•Neck Construction: 3-Bolt
•Fingerboard Radius: 7.25" (184.1 mm)
•Fingerboard Material: Maple
•Position Inlays: Black Dot
•Side Dots: Black
•Number of Frets: 20
•Truss Rod: Bullet Style
•Truss Rod Nut: Bullet Style
•String Nut: Synthetic Bone
•Nut Width: 1.625" (41.3 mm)
•Nut Material: Synthetic Bone
•Fret Size: Vintage Tall
•Scale Length: 34" (864 mm)
•Body: Alder
•Body Finish: Gloss Polyester
•Body Shape: Telecaster® Bass
•Body Material: Alder
•Bridge: 2-Saddle Vintage-Style Adjustable with Steel Barrel Saddles
•Bridge Mounting: 3-Screw Vintage-Style Hard-Tail
•Pickguard: 3-Ply Parchment
•Pickup Covers: Chrome
•Control Knobs: Knurled Flat-Top
•Hardware Finish: Nickel/Chrome
•Tuning Machines: Fender® '70s Vintage-Style Stamped Open-Gear
•String Trees: Vintage-Style Disc
•Strings: Fender® USA 7250M Nickel Plated Steel (.045-.105 Gauges), PN 0737250406
•Neck Plate: 3-Bolt "F" Stamped with Micro-Tilt™
•Strap Buttons: Vintage-Style
•Neck Pickup: Fender® "Wide Range" Humbucking Bass
•Pickup Configuration: H
•Controls: Master Volume, Master Tone
•Switching: None
•Truss Rod Wrench: 1/8" Hex (Allen)

item.title: Ibanez SR300EDX SR Standard Bass Guitar, 4-String, Wine Red Frozen Matte — $520.71
item.description:
$520.71 · Brand New · Janzen Brothers Music Company

Ibanez builds guitars for players of all levels—from beginners to the most demanding masters of the instrument. Regardless of price, Ibanez always strives to offer the absolute best sound, style, and playability in its class. The Standard series incorporates all the staples the Ibanez brand is famous for, such as fast necks, floating terms, and high-octane distortion in a package that is available and accessible to most players.

Features

5pc Maple/Walnut neck
The 5pc Maple/Walnut neck provides tonal clarity and superior attack.

PowerSpan Dual Coil pickups
Developed by Ibanez, the exposed pole pieces of the PowerSpan Dual Coil pickups produce a stronger signal and increase the response of the higher frequencies without sacrificing low end. The result is a tone rich in harmonic detail and dynamic expression.

Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ w/3-way Power Tap switch
The 3-band EQ works in conjunction with a coil tap switch for maximum control over a wide variety of professional bass tones. Tap Mode (single coil) creates a punchy, dynamic sound with superior articulation. Series Mode (humbucking) delivers a full, warm tone, and Power Tap Mode provides the best of both worlds-combining the clarity of the single coil with the fat bottom end of the humbucker.

Jatoba Fretboard
Jatoba has a reddish brown color which produces a rich mid range with a crisp high end.

Accu-cast B500 bridge
The Accu-cast B500 bridge has adjustable saddles for variable string spacing by +/- 1.5mm, answering every bassist’s specific string spacing needs.

Okoume body
The Okoume body provides a bright and solid sound.

Medium frets
Medium sized frets enhance the accuracy of your notes.

Technical Specifications
  • Neck Type: SR4
  • Neck Material: 5pc Maple/Walnut neck
  • Body Material: Okoume body
  • Fretboard: Jatoba fretboard
  • Inlays: White dot inlay
  • Frets: Medium frets
  • Fret Count: 24
  • Bridge: Accu-cast B500 bridge
  • Strings: D'Addario® EXL165
  • String Spacing: 19mm
  • Neck Pickup: PowerSpan Dual Coil neck pickup (Passive)
  • Bridge Pickup: PowerSpan Dual Coil bridge pickup (Passive)
  • Equalizer: Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ w/3-way Power Tap switch
  • Factory Tuning: 1G, 2D, 3A, 4E
  • String Gauge: .045/.065/.085/.105
  • Hardware Color: Gold
  • Scale Length: 34"
  • Nut Width: 38mm
  • Fret Width at 24th Fret: 62mm
  • Neck Thickness at 1st Fret: 19.5mm
  • Neck Thickness at 12th Fret: 21.5mm
  • Radius: 305mmR
SR300EDX's EQ curve diagram


The bass boost/cut frequency curve has a peak at 20 Hz, the variable width becomes smaller toward the high range, and the variable width becomes zero at about 1000 Hz. The variable range becomes slightly larger in the high range than around 1000 Hz, but it becomes zero again near 5000 Hz. The variable range of the peak frequency is approximately ±15 dB. The treble boost/cut frequency curve draws a mountain-shaped curve with a peak at around 10,000 Hz and zero variable range around 100 Hz. The variable range of the peak frequency is approximately ±15 dB. The mid-boost/cut frequency curve creates a bell-shaped curve with a peak around 450 Hz, and the variable width becomes zero near 20 Hz and around 10,000 Hz. The variable range of the peak frequency is approximately ±15 dB.

SR300EDX's control diagram


With the bass held in the playing position, there are three small knobs closest to the lower edge of the body. Directionally, from the lower bout towards the neck knobs are treble boost/cut, mid boost/cut, and bass boost/cut. There are two larger knobs above these, closer to the bridge. The knob closest to the neck controls volume, and the knob next to it is the pickup balancer control. There is a 3-way power tap switch next to the balancer knob. When the switch is in neck position, the humbuckers are tapped. When the switch is in center position, the humbuckers are in series. when the switch is in bridge position, the humbuckers are in power tap mode, which is tapped with additional low end added.

item.title: EMG PSJ 2026 — $175
item.description:
$175 · Excellent · Mark's Gear

Brand new set - never installed. I bought these and a couple others for basses i had but settled in on a tone and never used them

So you’ll get a mint, as new set here

item.title: ESP Stream Bass - Custom Shop - Exhibition Limited - Namm 2013 — $7,027.43
item.description:
$7,027.43 · Very Good · Raf's gear collection

This is a unique instrument!

This bass has been exposed at the 2013 Namm Show. ESP was introducing the Stream Bass models for the Japanese market.
This is an Exhibition Limited Unit made by the Custom Shop, it means there is only one with this color and finish.
You will see on the last picture that John Campbell, from Lamb of God, is using a Stream Bass.

Regarding this guitar : this is a great instrument, you can clearly admire the work of the Custom Shop team.
You will see on the pictures that it has been used and played. There are marks and dings, and some corrosion on the hardware, but it does not have any influence on the playability. The neck is straight, there is no fretwear and the sound is just huge.
This instrument is ready to rock!

Comes with a hard case but no certificate. I don't know if there was one.

item.title: EMG DW-PSJ set 2026 — $180
item.description:
$180 · Excellent · Mark's Gear

You might call these ‘open box’.. i bought the set for my Spector, opened the box and realized i needed a ‘long J’. This is the standard size set.


Im a fan of the original EMGs on 4 string basses. The Doug Wimbish is a special limited set that harkens back to that true, US model, mid 80’s EMG tone.

Product is brand new, i COULD HAVE returned it but opted to keep it jic i got another bass to use them in… i may still?

item.title: Squier P-Bass — $205.31
item.description:
$205.31 · Fair · Product Deliveries

THIS ITEM IS USED-WITH SCUFFS, SCRATCHES AND MISSING E STRING
PLEASE REFER TO PICTURES OF THE ITEM

In used working condition with scuffs, scratches, and missing E string.
Squire P-Bass Model: Affinity 
Comes with gig bag.
Local Pick Up Only. Calgary, AB.
